Target platform assumed to be a Web application.
Core features assumed to be add, list, mark as complete, and delete items.
No user authentication or multi-user functionality is assumed.
Data storage assumed to be client-side Local Storage.
User interface assumed to be minimalist and clean.
Frontend technology stack assumed to be React.js.
No backend technology stack is assumed, as data is client-side.
Deployment assumed to be via static site hosting.
